product_name: LANE LINEN 100% Cotton Kitchen Dish Cloths, 6 Pack, 12x12 Inches

risk_factors: Review wipe 891→7 (+40) | Established brand with large social following (+15) | Thin price $9.49 FBA margin (+5) | Seasonal Nov peak (+8)
feasibility_factors: Review wipe = Amazon scrutiny in market (-25) | Low entry barrier 8 reviews (+15) | Thin margin at $9.49 (-20) | BSR 98 proven demand (+10) | 2 FBA competitors moderate (+5)

feasibility_factors: Repeated wipes = active manipulation (-25) | But: titanium CATEGORY demand is real (+15) | Premium $65.99 = strong margin potential (+20) | Only 1 FBA competitor (+15) | Very new product / unproven (-10) | But: BSR 281 proves demand exists (+10)
manipulation_severity: SEVERE — 4 separate wipe events in 4 months; peak 330 reviews wiped to 118
verdict_reason: GoodArtificer is running a systematic review manipulation campaign (4 wipes in 4 months). HOWEVER: the TITANIUM CUTTING BOARD category itself has genuine demand (BSR 281 at peak, $65.99 stable price, trending on social). Recommend launching your OWN titanium cutting board with legitimate review acquisition — you would enter a market where the only FBA competitor is hamstrung by Amazon penalties.
